name: GreenPath Financial Wellness HQ
description_short: GreenPath Financial Wellness HQ is a credit repair provider based in Farmington Hills, Michigan. Rated 4.0/5 with 55 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
GreenPath Financial Wellness HQ is a credit repair provider serving clients in Farmington Hills, Michigan. Carrying a 4.0/5.0 Google rating from 55 reviews, GreenPath Financial Wellness HQ has an strong reputation among consumers in the Farmington Hills area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a corporate office, non-profit organization, GreenPath Financial Wellness HQ provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Farmington Hills, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. GreenPath Financial Wellness HQ operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Farmington Hills, Michigan area who are considering GreenPath Financial Wellness HQ should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
